scripts.dev:stack: npm run dev:api & npm run dev:web
scripts.android:prepare: npm run build:web:android && npm run cap:sync
scripts.android:apk: npm run android:prepare && cd android && JAVA_HOME="/Applications/Android Studio.app/Contents/jbr/Contents/Home" ANDROID_HOME="$HOME/Library/Android/sdk" ANDROID_SDK_ROOT="$HOME/Library/Android/sdk" ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@brandfix/types && npm run build --workspace=@brandfix/api && npm run build --workspace=@brandfix/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=@brandfix/types && npm run typecheck --workspace=@brandfix/api && npm run typecheck --workspace=@brandfix/web
